description_long: This is a sleek, modern business jet with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily white, accented by bold red wings and tail surfaces. The wings are sharply swept and mounted low on the fuselage, with a slight dihedral angle, and the tail features a distinctive T-tail configuration. The cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage, with a black-tinted windshield and several rectangular passenger windows along the sides. The aircraft has two jet engines mounted at the rear, integrated into the fuselage just ahead of the tail. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a visible nose wheel and main gear under the wings. The overall design suggests a high-performance, executive-class jet suitable for urban airports and private airfields.
description: A modern, white and red business jet with swept low wings, T-tail, and rear-mounted twin jet engines. Features a forward cockpit, multiple passenger windows, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, red swept wings, T-tail, and rear-mounted engines.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin jet engines, T-tail, and the full wingspan with red coloring.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the passenger windows, red wings, and landing gear.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit windows, and the low, swept wings extending outward.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units, partially visible and likely retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and black-tinted windshield.
